issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Assumes Docker, Linux/macOS, or Homebrew, limiting Windows compatibility.

scenarios.name: Self-host an OpenAI-compatible API with model config
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses LocalAI's specific docker-compose with GALLERIES env var, models/<name>.yaml config with backend: llama-cpp and template block, and shows the exact /models/apply gallery API; baseline gives generic llama.cpp/Ollama setup that does not match LocalAI's config schema.

scenarios.name: Use existing OpenAI SDK code for embeddings, images, and Whisper locally
scenarios.rationale: Treatment shows LocalAI as drop-in baseURL replacement with same OpenAI SDK calls for chat, embeddings (text-embedding-ada-002 alias), images (stablediffusion), and whisper-1, plus matching multi-model YAML configs; baseline glues together separate tools and does not preserve OpenAI SDK call shape.
